message:
Enhance beads with dependencies, tests, and logging specs

- Added missing dependencies for test beads (E2E harness, MockDevice)
- Enhanced test beads with comprehensive test case specifications
- Added detailed logging requirements (TRACE/DEBUG/INFO/WARN/ERROR)
- Updated implementation beads with code examples and edge cases
- Verified dependency structure: 173 beads, 0 cycles, 112 ready-to-work

Key enhancements:
- bd-vh6: Web API integration tests expanded with full endpoint coverage
- bd-16u: Export tests expanded with path escaping and shell variants
- bd-1os: open_with_retry with exponential backoff and logging
- bd-3dy: Directory scanning with pattern matching and logging
- bd-e36: Session state tracking with thread-safe access
- bd-2vg: Config loading with format detection and validation
- bd-326: Auto-reconnect with connection events for robot mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
